title: Bangalore Baptist Hospital
description: Bangalore Baptist Hospital (BBH) an 80-bed general hospital was formally opened on 15 January 1973.
text:
Bangalore Baptist Hospital Emergency +91 80 22024700 Virtual Tour View your Report Home About Patients Find a doctor Registration Process Admission Process Services & facilities Billing & Insurance Book an appointment Book a Health checkup Specialities & departments Home Collection Virtual Tour Patient Rights and Orientation Express Healthcare Kothanur Homecare Physiotherapy Careers Academics Clinical Post Graduation Programs Institute of Nursing Allied Health Sciences (ALHS) Patient Counselling Division Express Clinic Express Healthcare Kothanur Express Healthcare Lingarajapuram Donate Community Health Division Mercy Drops Donate to BBH Donate to Golden Jubilee Block Online Payments Research Contact Book an appointment Book a Health checkup Find a doctor Departments & specialities Explore some of our specialities Cardiology Paediatrics Agewell Clinic : Geriatric Medicine Orthopaedics & Spine Surgery Obstetrics & Gynaecology (OBG) Reproductive Medicine Unit (Infertility / IVF) 0 Outpatients (Jan- Dec (2025)) 0 Inpatients (Jan-Dec(2025)) 0 Surgeries (Jan-Dec (2025)) 53 years of satisfied patients We sincerely appreciate the Dr Suman rath and staff for their excellent care, support and kindness throughout the treatment. Mr Nithin Mudaliar, Parent 53 years of satisfied patients My experience at BBH was well above medical treatment standards. The physicians, nurses and staff successfully eradicated my disease with unbelievable care and compassion. Their attention to ensuring my well-being was exceptional. Sahana Joshua, Cancer survivor 53 years of satisfied patients I sincerely appreciate the excellent care and support provided by the hospital. The doctor Dominic and nurses, and staff were very professional, kind, and attentive.' Anil Bapat P, Patient 53 years of satisfied patients I am grateful to give feedback on behalf of My Mother Mrs. Lurd Mary.

This doctor is just amazing and whatever I say is just less. Not everyone is as lucky as I was having Dr Mahalakshmi by my mother's side when she needed her most. I mean what to write because sometimes you fall short of words for someone to tell her what she has done for you. Never ever have I come across a doctor like her who is so thorough in her domain that you tell her the symptoms and there she is with her effective prescription which does wonders. Extremely patient, gold listener, empathetic in her approach and above all always ready to go that extra mile to help the ailing patient. It was because of her and the expert advice she gave that my mother recovered in a short span of time. Being a caring daughter  sometimes I was annoying too with my constant queries but she handled everything with a smile and never ever did let me feel that I am disturbing her with my pings. Doc of her kind is the word. 

Even after consultation if I had any queries she was immediately responding to my texts. I felt I was talking to a very close family doctor.  Without even a second thought you can consult this doctor😀😀 and it works magical for sure. Ms. Shanthi, Daughter 53 years of satisfied patients Last week, I had a health package at Bangalore Baptist Hospital, and I was very impressed with the excellent service and coordination with patients.
The consultation with Dr. Srividhya was very good, and the overall hospital service was excellent. I am happy to share this positive feedback about my experience.
 I'll give overall rating for hospital service 10. Pr. Sashi Kumar , Patient Community Health Division CHD serves as the outreach service arm of BBH by making a difference to the lives of the poor & marginalized groups living in the rural & urban areas of Bangalore.
